scripts.dev: concurrently -n UI,API -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w service-nutrivae-ui" "npm run dev -w service-nutrivae-api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nutrivae/shared && npm run build -w service-nutrivae-api && npm run build -w service-nutrivae-ui
scripts.test: npm run build -w @nutrivae/shared && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @nutrivae/shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test
scripts.db:bootstrap: prisma db push --force-reset --schema packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma && npm run db:seed
